key_insight: akaitools turns AkaiKKR’s plain-text outputs into structured, Python-native objects for automated analysis, plotting, and pipeline integration.
engineering_relevance: It enables faster, reproducible high-throughput studies of disordered and magnetic materials by removing manual parsing bottlenecks.
method: Parses AkaiKKR SCF, DOS, and Bloch spectral function outputs into immutable dataclasses with NumPy arrays.
Supports unit handling in Rydbergs and electronvolts, plus export to Pandas DataFrames and JSON.
Includes Matplotlib plotting tools, a CLI for summaries, and an input-file generator for end-to-end workflows.
evidence_signal: The abstract describes three covered output types and multiple utilities, but does not report benchmark datasets or quantitative performance evaluation.
watch_item: Coverage is limited to the supported AkaiKKR output formats, so unsupported file variants or version changes may require parser updates.
paper_title: akaitools: A Python package for parsing and analyzing AkaiKKR electronic structure calculations
